description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image and runs a global before_script to update the package list and install python2.7, python3.4, python-tox, python-lxml, and python3-lxml via apt-get. Define a single stage named test. Add a job called test in the test stage that executes the command tox -e py27,py34. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules, so the test job runs on every pipeline execution.
